docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP: $0.00) SERVED JUL-24-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SETO, DONNA
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $100.00 FILED BY KHANI, MEHDI AS TO DEFENDANT SETO, DONNA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-24-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHANI, MEHDI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHANI, MEHDI

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-07-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-07-2018 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY ARTHUR SETO AS CANTONESE INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-07-2018 - JUDGMENT.
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-07-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-24-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHANI, MEHDI AS TO DEFENDANT SETO, DONNA
STIPULATION BEFORE PRO TEM FILED BY KHANI, MEHDI SETO, DONNA

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVER>);THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE OF A BAD ADDRESS. THE CURRENT TENANT ADVISED OVER THE PHONE, THE NAMED DEFENDANT DOES NOT RESIDE AT THIS ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF KHANI, MEHDI AS TO DEFENDANT SETO, DONNA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KHANI, MEHDI RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SETO, DONNA $100.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $130.00, PLAINTIFF DID NOT ESTABLISH BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT THE LEASE AGREEMENT ENTITLED HIM TO FURNITURE WHICH APPEARS TO HAVE BEEN LENT TO PLAINTIFF AS A FAVOR. HOWEVER, DEFENDANT DID NOT SUPPLY THE INVENTORY REQUIRED BY THE LEASE, AND THERE SHOULD HAD HAVE OFFSET FOR PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO MOVE THE FURNITURE DOWNSTAIRS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 9/11/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO MAIL RECEPTACLE - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
